productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Evader DB Black Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Evader DT combines lightweight comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.UpperSynthetic upper for durability and comfortFabric overlay in the midfoot and reinforced overlay at the heelLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortBranding on the tongue and at the back of the collarMidsoleTPU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDeep flex grooves on the outsoleshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
